name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
          /\ turn' <= N
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
Messages == Sequence(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init ==
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ coordinator' = "PrepareSent"
  /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants respond with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
ParticipantVote ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants[p] = "Init"
       /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg.type = Prepare
            /\ msg.receiver = p
            /\ msg.sender = Coordinator
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> VoteYes])

(* Coordinator decides to Commit if all participants voted yes *)
CoordinatorCommit ==
  /\ coordinator = "PrepareSent"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes"
  /\ coordinator' = "CommitSent"
  /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Committed"]
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p

(* Coordinator decides to Abort if any participant voted no *)
CoordinatorAbort ==
  /\ coordinator = "PrepareSent"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedNo"
  /\ coordinator' = "AbortSent"
  /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Aborted"]
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants abort upon receiving Abort *)
ParticipantAbort ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
       /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg.type = Abort
            /\ msg.receiver = p
            /\ msg.sender = Coordinator
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> Abort])

(* Participants commit upon receiving Commit *)
ParticipantCommit ==
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
       /\ participants[p] = "VotedYes"
       /\ \E msg \in messages :
            /\ msg.type = Commit
            /\ msg.receiver = p
            /\ msg.sender = Coordinator
       /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> Commit])

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ CoordinatorPrepare
  \/ ParticipantVote
  \/ CoordinatorCommit
  \/ CoordinatorAbort
  \/ ParticipantAbort
  \/ ParticipantCommit

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "PrepareSent", "CommitSent", "AbortSent"}
  /\ messages \in Messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[Left(i)] = -1 /\ forks[Right(i)] = -1

TakeForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = Left(i), ![Left(i)] = i]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![Left(i)] = -1]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (state[i] = "thinking" /\ state'[i] = "hungry" /\ forks' = forks /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"])
        \/ (Hungry(i) /\ CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i))
        \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E x \in Nat : Enqueue(x)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = {}
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
